channel.title: Azure Policy Aliases
channel.description: Recent content on Azure Policy Aliases

item.description: Link to resource definition: Microsoft.PolicyInsights/attestations Default Path Alias properties.assessmentDate Microsoft.PolicyInsights/attestations/assessmentDate properties.comments Microsoft.PolicyInsights/attestations/comments properties.complianceState Microsoft.PolicyInsights/attestations/complianceState properties.evidence Microsoft.PolicyInsights/attestations/evidence properties.evidence[*] Microsoft.PolicyInsights/attestations/evidence[*] properties.evidence[*].description Microsoft.PolicyInsights/attestations/evidence[*].description properties.evidence[*].sourceUri Microsoft.PolicyInsights/attestations/evidence[*].sourceUri properties.expiresOn Microsoft.PolicyInsights/attestations/expiresOn properties.lastComplianceStateChangeAt Microsoft.PolicyInsights/attestations/lastComplianceStateChangeAt properties.owner Microsoft.PolicyInsights/attestations/owner properties.policyAssignmentId Microsoft.PolicyInsights/attestations/policyAssignmentId properties.policyDefinitionReferenceId Microsoft.PolicyInsights/attestations/policyDefinitionReferenceId properties.provisioningState Microsoft.PolicyInsights/attestations/provisioningState

Link to resource definition: Microsoft.PolicyInsights/remediations Default Path Alias properties.correlationId Microsoft.PolicyInsights/remediations/correlationId properties.createdOn Microsoft.PolicyInsights/remediations/createdOn properties.deploymentStatus Microsoft.PolicyInsights/remediations/deploymentStatus properties.deploymentStatus.failedDeployments Microsoft.PolicyInsights/remediations/deploymentStatus.failedDeployments properties.deploymentStatus.successfulDeployments Microsoft.PolicyInsights/remediations/deploymentStatus.successfulDeployments properties.deploymentStatus.totalDeployments Microsoft.PolicyInsights/remediations/deploymentStatus.totalDeployments properties.failureThreshold Microsoft.PolicyInsights/remediations/failureThreshold properties.failureThreshold.percentage Microsoft.PolicyInsights/remediations/failureThreshold.percentage properties.filters Microsoft.PolicyInsights/remediations/filters properties.filters.locations Microsoft.PolicyInsights/remediations/filters.locations properties.filters.locations[*] Microsoft.PolicyInsights/remediations/filters.locations[*] properties.filters.resourceIds Microsoft.PolicyInsights/remediations/filters.resourceIds properties.filters.resourceIds[*] Microsoft.PolicyInsights/remediations/filters.resourceIds[*] properties.lastUpdatedOn Microsoft.PolicyInsights/remediations/lastUpdatedOn properties.parallelDeployments Microsoft.PolicyInsights/remediations/parallelDeployments properties.policyAssignmentId Microsoft.PolicyInsights/remediations/policyAssignmentId properties.policyDefinitionReferenceId Microsoft.PolicyInsights/remediations/policyDefinitionReferenceId properties.provisioningState Microsoft.PolicyInsights/remediations/provisioningState properties.resourceCount Microsoft.PolicyInsights/remediations/resourceCount properties.resourceDiscoveryMode Microsoft.PolicyInsights/remediations/resourceDiscoveryMode properties.statusMessage Microsoft.PolicyInsights/remediations/statusMessage
